 {"id":"bd-c4rq","title":"Refactor: Move staleness check inside daemon branch","description":"## Problem

Currently ensureDatabaseFresh() is called before the daemon mode check, but it checks daemonClient != nil internally and returns early. This is redundant.

**Location:** All read commands (list.go:196, show.go:27, ready.go:102, status.go:80, etc.)

## Current Pattern

Call happens before daemon check, function checks daemonClient internally.

## Better Pattern

Move staleness check to direct mode branch only, after daemon check.

## Impact
Low - minor performance improvement (avoids one function call per command in daemon mode)

## Effort
Medium - requires refactoring 8 command files

## Priority
Low - can defer to future cleanup PR","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"chore","created_at":"2025-11-20T20:17:45.119583-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-09T18:38:37.686612072-05:00","closed_at":"2025-11-28T23:37:52.276192-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-c4wq","title":"Work on gt-8tmz.36: Validate expanded step IDs are unique...","description":"Work on gt-8tmz.36: Validate expanded step IDs are unique. When done: 1) bd close gt-8tmz.36, 2) bd sync, 3) git push, 4) gt mq submit","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-25T19:26:31.323192-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T19:37:49.605774-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-25T19:37:49.605774-08:00"}
